metadata.description: Comprehensive plugin marketplace: Personal framework (behavioral rules, 14 specialist agents, MCP configs) + ClaudeKit skills (35+ skills) + Custom skills (1Password, Airbyte, SEO, web design, etc.) + Enterprise integrations (NetSuite/SDF, Celigo iPaaS, Shopify, Atlassian, Plytix PIM, NinjaOne RMM, M365/Azure AD, Amazon SP-API, Mimecast, Slack, Meraki, n8n, MongoDB Atlas) + Infrastructure skills + EDI/PDF specialist + Google Analytics

plugins.name: personal-framework
plugins.description: Lean behavioral rules, engineering principles, 14 specialist agents, and MCP server configs (Context7, Sequential, Magic, Serena, Morphllm)

plugins.name: celigo-integration
plugins.description: Celigo iPaaS integration via Python CLI - ~160 operations across 20 resource types with full REST API coverage

plugins.name: claudekit-skills
plugins.description: Curated collection of 35+ specialized skills: Claude Code mastery, Next.js, Tailwind CSS, shadcn-ui, FFmpeg, ImageMagick, better-auth, MCP builder, debugging, document processing, Google ADK, and more

plugins.name: netsuite-skills
plugins.description: NetSuite expertise skills: PRI Container Tracking, SDF deployment, SuiteQL queries, File Cabinet, CRE 2.0, Script Execution Logs, API Toolkit, PRI Query Renderer, and NetSuite debugger

plugins.name: shopify-workflows
plugins.description: Shopify Admin API workflow automation with 5 specialized skills for content creation, merchant operations, marketing campaigns, developer integrations, and analytics

plugins.name: atlassian-skills
plugins.description: Atlassian Confluence and Jira operations via REST API. Includes page creation/update/archive, search, attachments, markdown-to-Confluence conversion with Mermaid diagram support, Jira issue management, JQL queries, and transitions

plugins.name: plytix-skills
plugins.description: Plytix PIM operations via REST API. Includes product management, digital asset handling, category organization, variant creation, and attribute schema management

plugins.name: ninjaone-skills
plugins.description: NinjaOne RMM API integration for device monitoring, management, ticketing, and reporting. Full coverage of 70+ endpoints with OAuth 2.0 authentication

plugins.name: m365-skills
plugins.description: Microsoft 365 and Azure integrations via Microsoft Graph API. Includes Azure AD/Entra ID operations for users, groups, devices, and directory management

plugins.name: amazon-spapi
plugins.description: Amazon Selling Partner API integration via Python CLI. Full coverage for Vendor (1P) and Seller operations including POs, shipments, invoices, orders, catalog, inventory, reports, feeds, pricing, finances, and notifications

plugins.name: mimecast-skills
plugins.description: Mimecast email security integration via Python CLI. 67 operations for TTP URL/attachment protection, held messages, awareness training, SAFE scores, phishing simulations, user/group management, policies, audit logs, and SIEM integration. Includes M365/Azure AD cross-reference audit.

plugins.name: portable-setup
plugins.description: Portable Claude Code configuration system - export, transfer, install, and synchronize your setup across all servers via git

plugins.name: n8n-integration
plugins.description: n8n workflow automation via MCP - 38 tools for workflow management, node discovery, validation, templates, execution monitoring, AI agent patterns, and integration best practices

plugins.name: adventurelog-skills
plugins.description: AdventureLog trip planning skill for creating rich, fully-detailed trips via the REST API. Covers collections, locations, transportation, lodging, notes, checklists, itinerary days, and scheduling

plugins.name: compound-engineering
plugins.description: Compound engineering workflow pipeline: brainstorm → plan → work → review → compound. 29 agents, 22 commands, 19 skills for multi-agent parallel code review, knowledge compounding, swarm orchestration, and autonomous workflows (lfg/slfg)

plugins.name: meraki-skills
plugins.description: Cisco Meraki Dashboard API integration for network monitoring and management. Covers organizations, networks, devices, wireless, switches, MX appliances, and cameras.

plugins.name: slack-skills
plugins.description: Official Slack MCP integration. Search messages/files/channels, send messages and drafts, create canvases, and manage user profiles. 5 commands, 3 skills.

plugins.name: infra-skills
plugins.description: Infrastructure management skills for tchow homelab — health monitoring and deployments across Tailscale (12 servers), NinjaOne RMM, and Portainer Docker environments

plugins.name: google-analytics
plugins.description: Google Analytics 4 and Search Console integration for SEO optimization, conversion attribution, multi-account property management, and revenue attribution workflows

plugins.name: edi-document-specialist
plugins.description: EDI document mapping, PDF template generation, and notification specialist for B2B Dashboard. X12 EDI segments (810, 850, 855, 856, 860), BFO PDF rendering, and CRE2 template patterns

plugins.name: mongodb-atlas-skills
plugins.description: MongoDB Atlas API skills for monitoring alerts, clusters, and performance metrics via the Atlas Admin API v2

plugins.name: custom-skills
plugins.description: Personal custom skills: 1Password credential lookup, Airbyte integration, Beads design system, BubbleTea TUI, copy editing, find-skills discovery, screenshots, SEO audit, user guide creation, Vercel React best practices, and web design guidelines
